top_signals.title: Greek LNG Buyer Says Long-Term US Deals Getting More Difficult
top_signals.summary: The boss of Greece’s Atlantic SEE LNG Trade said it’s becoming more difficult to secure long-term liquefied natural gas deals with US suppliers, after the Iran war upended the global market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Emerging-Market Stocks Drop as Chinese E-Commerce Joins AI Slide
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market stocks dropped for the sixth time in seven days as a regulatory censure sparked a selloff in Chinese e-commerce stocks and another flare-up in the Middle Eastern conflict sapped risk appetite.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. becomes India’s top gas supplier, as Iran war cuts it off from the Gulf
top_signals.summary: India's gas purchases from the U.S. have grown steadily, driven by Washington’s push to sell more American energy to the South Asian country.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Live updates: Bitcoin rises above $62,000 ahead of highly anticipated SpaceX IPO
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
